name: io.github.rascal-3/chainanalyzer-mcp
description: Multi-chain AML risk scoring, sanctions screening, and tx tracing across 8 chains live for self-serve (BTC, ETH, POL, BASE, ARB, OP, AVAX, SOL) plus BNB Smart Chain on Enterprise rollout.

environmentVariables.name: X402_WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: EVM wallet private key used to sign x402 USDC micropayments on Base (required for pay-per-request mode)

environmentVariables.name: CHAINANALYZER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: ChainAnalyzer API key (tfk_...) for subscription-based billing instead of x402 micropayments

environmentVariables.name: CHAINANALYZER_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (default: https://chain-analyzer.com)
